audit_summary.description: Daily errands do not require a car. This is a top-tier walkable neighborhood in Portland.

sidewalk_coverage.description: Continuous sidewalks on NW 23rd Avenue, NW Lovejoy, NW Northrup, and all cross streets. No gaps in sidewalk coverage within the 1km analysis radius.
sidewalk_coverage.notes: Sidewalks are well-maintained and ADA-compliant at most intersections.

crosswalks_and_signalizations.description: Signalized intersections at all major cross streets: Marshall, Lovejoy, Northrup, and Burnside. Marked crosswalks at every intersection along NW 23rd Ave.

pedestrian_safety.description: NW 23rd is a relatively quiet residential/commercial street with low vehicle speeds. Traffic calming measures present on side streets.
pedestrian_safety.notes: Lower traffic volumes compared to major arterials; street parking provides buffer.

shade_and_urban_forest.description: Street trees along most blocks on NW 23rd Avenue and surrounding streets. Mature canopy provides shade in summer.

street_furniture_amenities.benches: Multiple benches at transit stops along NW 23rd Ave
street_furniture_amenities.lighting: Good street lighting on main corridors

barriers_and_challenges.notes: No significant pedestrian barriers within 1km. Section of NW 23rd near Marshall has moderate hill grade.
barriers_and_challenges.hilliest_segment: NW 23rd Ave near Marshall St — approximately 5% grade
barriers_and_challenges.water_features: No rivers or creeks within 1km (nearest: Willamette River ~1.5km south)

cycle_tracks: NW 21st Street cycle track (1 block south)
NW 18th Street cycle track (3 blocks south)
bike_infrastructure_details.bike_lanes: Bike lanes connecting NW 23rd to downtown via NW Davis/NW Lovejoy
bike_infrastructure_details.share_program: Biketown stations available in the NW 23rd & Marshall area
bike_infrastructure_details.bike_parking: Bike racks at street corners throughout NW 23rd Ave commercial zone

to_downtown.infrastructure_quality: Dedicated bike lanes and cycle tracks on parallel streets

to_pearl_district.route: NW 23rd south to NW Lovejoy → Pearl District
to_pearl_district.infrastructure_quality: Excellent — dedicated bike lanes and low traffic

foot.route_name: NW 23rd Avenue → NW Davis/SW Alder (most direct walking route)

car.route_name: US-26 W or I-405 S to downtown
car.notes: Time varies significantly with traffic (8-20 min)

transit.route_name: Streetcar NS Line from NW 23rd & Marshall to SW 3rd/Burnside or GW沿线到市中心
transit.notes: Includes walk to/from stops; total trip time incl. wait

restaurants.note: One of the highest restaurant densities in Portland
